context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct pageCreate GraphQL mutation with all required variables (templateSuffix matching the page handle, isPublished true, body content), creates the template file with the correct filename convention, and includes a main-page section in the template.

checklist.name: pageCreate mutation used
checklist.description: shopify/page-setup.md contains the pageCreate mutation (not pageUpdate, productCreate, or another mutation name)

checklist.name: handle set correctly
checklist.description: The pageCreate variables include 'handle': 'black-friday' (or equivalent handle matching the page URL slug)

checklist.name: templateSuffix equals handle
checklist.description: The pageCreate variables include 'templateSuffix': 'black-friday' — matching the handle value, not 'page.black-friday' or any other format

checklist.name: body field present
checklist.description: The pageCreate variables include a non-empty 'body' field with intro paragraph content

checklist.name: Template filename correct
checklist.description: The template file is named exactly templates/page.black-friday.json (matching the pattern templates/page.<handle>.json)

checklist.name: main-page section in template
checklist.description: templates/page.black-friday.json contains a section of type 'main-page' that renders the page body content

checklist.name: main-page in order array
checklist.description: The 'main-page' section key appears in the 'order' array of templates/page.black-friday.json

checklist.name: Hero section present
checklist.description: templates/page.black-friday.json contains a section of type 'image-banner' serving as the hero

checklist.name: Hero before main-page
checklist.description: In the 'order' array, the hero image-banner section appears before the main-page section

checklist.name: theme push command present
checklist.description: shopify/page-setup.md includes the shopify theme push --theme=139847562302 command (or equivalent push command with the correct theme ID)
